theme: Porto: The underrated gem for corporate groups

linkedin.text:
Your team has been to Barcelona three times. That's exactly why you should send them to Porto.

We've routed more groups through Porto in the last 18 months than anywhere else — and it's become our go-to for teams of 30-80. Here's why:

🏰 Wine caves from the 1600s you can actually dine in. Ribeira evenings. Tile workshops that turn into real team moments.
🍷 Exclusive Port tastings at historic lodges, fresh Atlantic fish — the foodies will talk about it for years.
✈️ 3.5h from Tel Aviv, 1-2h from most EU hubs, direct flights, no transit.
💰 25-35% more cost-efficient than Lisbon. Boutique hotels under €150/night.
🎯 The novelty factor: nobody's been. That drives engagement more than you'd think.

Our last group: 45 fintech execs, 4 nights, 9.4/10. Two extended their stay.

Porto is for teams who want authentic over resort, and are quietly tired of the usual shortlist.

📅 Book a free 30-minute call and we'll cost out Porto for your group.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EmployeeEngagement #B2BEvents #MICE #Leadership
linkedin.cta: DM or visit upe.co.il to start planning

facebook.text:
We sent a fintech team to Porto last year half-expecting them to wish they'd gone to Barcelona again. 🏰

They came back with a 9.4/10 — and two of them extended their stay.

The magic of Porto is that nobody's been. So when you dine inside a 400-year-old wine cave, taste Port at a historic lodge, and spend a morning on the Ribeira waterfront, it all feels genuinely new. And it costs 25-35% less than Lisbon.

It's for teams who'd rather have authentic culture than another beach resort.

Is your team quietly tired of the usual shortlist? Send us a message and we'll show you Porto. 💬
